current.summary: All 4 layers complete. Core bug fixed: syllago add --from <registry-name> now works. 17 benchmark skills imported and installed to 7 providers. Gemini skill conflict discovered — edge case: Codex and Gemini CLI share ~/.agents/skills/ install path, causing duplicate installs and Gemini conflict warnings.

activeWork.description: Implement --to-all flag and benchmark skill installer workflow
activeWork.progress: Layer 1 (--to-all flag): COMPLETE — committed de44f8f. Layer 2 (benchmark registry): COMPLETE — syllago add --from <registry-name> bug fixed (committed 0b8c449), 17 skills imported, installed to all 7 providers. Layer 3 (workflow doc): COMPLETE — docs/research/skill-behavior-checks/workflow-syllago-install.md. Layer 4 (roadmap): COMPLETE — syllago-k55bj bead, README updated. Task 2.5 (canary verification) is MANUAL — needs fresh Claude Code session.

keyCommits: de44f8f feat: add --to-all flag to install command

geminiConflicts.description: Gemini CLI reported skill conflicts after the benchmark install. All 17 skills were flagged.
geminiConflicts.rootCause: Codex installs skills to ~/.agents/skills/ (see cli/internal/provider/codex.go). Gemini CLI installs to ~/.gemini/skills/. syllago install --to-all detected both providers as active and installed to BOTH paths. Gemini CLI then scans BOTH paths and flags the duplicate as a conflict — ~/.agents/skills/ (from the Codex install) overrides ~/.gemini/skills/ (from the Gemini install).

geminiConflicts.edgeCaseAnalysis: ~/.agents/skills/ is an emerging cross-platform convention: multiple providers treat it as a shared global skills directory. Codex uses it as its PRIMARY install path for skills. Gemini CLI also reads from it (likely as a cross-agent compatibility path). When --to-all installs to both Codex and Gemini, the same skill lands in two directories that Gemini scans — triggering its dedup/conflict detection.
geminiConflicts.currentState: Skills are present in BOTH ~/.agents/skills/ AND ~/.gemini/skills/ for all 17 benchmark skills. Gemini is functioning (skills load, ~/.agents wins priority), but conflict warnings appear at startup.
potentialFixes: syllago fix: --to-all could detect when two providers resolve to the same install directory for a content type and skip the duplicate write (install once, not twice).
syllago fix: install --to-all summary table could flag shared-path collisions as a warning.
Workaround: uninstall skills from one path (e.g., syllago uninstall --type skills --from codex).
Not-a-bug framing: probe-cross-scope is specifically designed to test cross-directory detection; these conflicts are the benchmark working as intended.

recentDecisions: syllago add --from required full code fix, not a workaround — implemented as DiscoverFromRegistry in add package + runAddFromRegistry in add_cmd.go
Registry config is stored at the CONTENT ROOT (.syllago/config.json), not project root — runAddFromRegistry must load from findContentRepoRoot(), not just findProjectRoot()

ScanRegistriesOnly returns item.Path as a DIRECTORY for directory-walk registries, but as a FILE for index-based registries — DiscoverFromRegistry must check IsDir() and call findContentFile() accordingly
commands.json regeneration required after any CLI flag changes (pre-push hook enforces)
telemetry.Enrich required for runAddFromRegistry per telemetry-enrichment.md rule
nextSteps: Task 2.5 (MANUAL): Open a fresh Claude Code session and ask 'Do you know CARDINAL-ZEBRA-7742?' to verify canary phrase loads from benchmark skills
Decide: fix the --to-all shared-path deduplication issue in syllago, or document as known behavior
If fixing: detect when two providers share an install directory for a type; skip duplicate write; warn in summary table
Optional: syllago uninstall --type skills --from codex to eliminate conflict state on this machine

context.notes: The core implementation is complete and pushed. The Gemini conflict is a real edge case that revealed a gap in --to-all: it doesn't deduplicate install paths across providers. Codex and Gemini both claim ~/.agents/skills/ for skills (Codex as primary install, Gemini as compatibility discovery path), so --to-all writes there twice. New code: DiscoverFromRegistry in cli/internal/add/add.go; runAddFromRegistry + findRegistryForSlug in cli/cmd/syllago/add_cmd.go; 9 tests in cli/cmd/syllago/add_cmd_registry_test.go. Content-root config lookup fix is critical for registry operations in projects with a contentRoot setting.

previousSessions.summary: Fixed syllago add --from <registry-name> bug. Implemented DiscoverFromRegistry in add package, runAddFromRegistry in add_cmd.go, findRegistryForSlug helper. Added 9 tests. Imported 17 benchmark skills from agent-ecosystem/agent-skill-implementation, installed to all 7 providers via --to-all. Discovered Gemini skill conflict edge case: Codex and Gemini share ~/.agents/skills/, causing duplicate installs.
Layers 1, 3, and 4 complete and pushed. Layer 2 blocked: the registry repo agent-ecosystem/agent-skill-implementation does not exist on GitHub yet.
Reviewed benchmark installer implementation plan — assessed current state, all 4 layers are unstarted. Creating handoff for future execution.
